securityHint: Managed endpoint UI. Security-sensitive actions require local admin password.
connectedTeacher: Connected to control server. Monitoring is active on this managed endpoint.
onboardingDesc: Two steps: local security and control-server connection.
onboardingHintText: Without local admin password, critical actions like unpair, agent stop, and policy changes are blocked.
onboardingNoServers: No servers found. Retry discovery or enter a manual address.
onboardingSelectTargetHint: Choose a discovered server or provide a manual endpoint.
onboardingLiveDiscovery: Live server discovery is running in real time.
onboardingAutoSelectNotice: Found {count} server node(s). Recommended target selected automatically.
onboardingEnterPinHint: Enter the one-time PIN from control console (short lifetime).
step1Desc: Set local admin password. Required for unpair, agent stop, and autostart downgrade.
enableAutoStartNow: Enable Agent autostart right after setup
step2Desc: Discover a server in LAN or provide manual address, then enter one-time PIN.
manualFallbackHint: Use only if discovery did not find the expected server.
runtimeDesc: Current connectivity, policy flags, and agent state.
agentControlsDesc: Stop and policy update operations are password-protected.
securityActionsDesc: Unpair requires admin password and stops active monitoring relation.
monitoringSecurityDesc: Production detection status, self-test, and diagnostics export.
detectionControlsHint: Changes below are applied only after you press Save detection config.
detectionDraftChangedHint: You have unsaved changes. Save config or reset the draft.
detectionEnabledHint: Main switch for AI-interface checks on this endpoint.
collectionEnabledHint: Allows local dataset collection for future model training.
metadataThresholdHint: Lower value means more triggers based on window/process metadata.
mlThresholdHint: ONNX model threshold (when model is available): higher means stricter alerts.
sampleRateHint: Share of changed frames saved while collection mode is enabled.
retentionDaysHint: How many days local samples are kept before auto-cleanup.
unpairHint: Unpairing removes current server binding. Re-connection requires discovery and PIN.
lockedDesc: Enter local admin password to access controls. Monitoring and agent remain active.
deviceNameDesc: Alias shown in central console and persisted locally.
